rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SMALLEY FAMILY TRUST (1992 & AS AMENDED)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Destroy Or, Alternatively, Seal Court Records
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Destroy or Alternatively Seal Court Records is granted. The document entitled "Supplemental Declaration of Justin M. Alvarez in Support of Request for Payment of Attorney Fees and Costs" filed 2/27/2014 attached 5 pages of material protected by the attorney client privilege. The Supplemental Declaration is hereby ordered sealed and removed from public view. Mr. Alvarez shall refile an endorsed filed copy of his Supplemental Declaration by attaching it to a cover sheet and redacting Exhibit A (4 pages) and Exhibit B (1 page). Any party who received a copy of Exhibit A and Exhibit B shall return said pages to Mr. Alvarez within 10 days without copying. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 4/9/2014. Mr. Alvarez to prepare the order.
